summary: Doctrine architecture finale verrouillée post red team triangulation 5 prismes. CI master + 4 sub-doctrines + frame test + meta-process. 6 skills CMR-compliant. Operator-facing rule absolue actée.

changes.summary: CMR doctrine v0.2 — production mechanism for intersectional outputs. Schema + canon matrix + modulator/cell + cardinality cap + internal scoring. Three modes (coding / generating / pipeline) + hybrid. 13 invariants + 14 anti-patterns + decision-aid + breakthrough mode opt-in §10bis. Sub-pattern of execution of CI on intersectional production.

SED doctrine v0.1 — substrate sub-doctrine. Consolidates 11 previously-scattered sub-disciplines (mutation rule, _field_types, _version semver, sourcing tags, triangulation, validation runtime, append-only conventions, snapshot/manifest regen, conventions plateforme, extension layer, memory & observability). Two layers: spatial encoding (entities/fields/schemas) + temporal encoding (events/learnings/awareness). Prerequisite of CMR.

SAD doctrine v0.1 — meta-discipline above SED + CMR. Consolidates 5 skill-* docs + patterns.md skill sections. Three layers (single skill authoring + skill composition + system lifecycle). Three new rules: frontmatter triad CMR-compliance machine-verifiable, Skill Composition Contract, Failure doctrine with invariant-violation hook routing to capture-learning.

Meta-process for doctrine evolution. Promotion criterion (≥3 instances + extractibility test + cross-ref + D# locked). Amendment append-only via D# new with [SUPERSEDES Dxxx]. Retraction via [DEPRECATED Sxx] window. Conflict resolution layer hierarchy + same-layer territorial.

Sub-corpus sections added: Architectural Invariants, Inviolable Mechanical Floor, Surface Contract. Sister disciplines section listing SED/CMR/SAD/PTD with territory + file. Frame test (Extractibility D#307) section added. References extended with D#362-365.
Anti-pattern Doctrine Acronym Leak added. CI/SED/CMR/SAD/PTD never visible operator-facing. Test before shipping: search line for acronyms. Match → rewrite.

Master doctrine extended with Sub-doctrines section listing 4 operating disciplines + Doctrine Governance. Operator-facing rule absolue acted explicit (NEVER expose doctrine names or acronyms in operator-facing output).

Frontmatter triad CMR (reasoning_pattern: matrix-driven, matrix_mode: generating, consumes: 6 paths). Hard Rules added: weights externalized canon (refuse inline override), voice consistency cross-block, emotional diversity check post-rank, risk_bet slot opt-in via --mode=breakthrough.
Frontmatter triad CMR (matrix_mode: generating, consumes: 5 paths).
Frontmatter triad CMR (matrix_mode: coding, consumes: voc-coding.md).
Frontmatter triad CMR (matrix_mode: coding, consumes: vom-mining.md).
Frontmatter triad CMR (matrix_mode: generating, consumes: 2 paths).

v0.1 audit-only producer Sonnet subagent_safe. Refacto S44: frontmatter triad CMR (matrix_mode: hybrid coding+generating), modulator macro Schwartz awareness × sophistication + persona/register, selective activation of 12 dimensions, tempo dimension, voice consistency cross-block, Hard Rules 9-12 (sourcing-mort cap, voice consistency, tempo, breakthrough mode opt-in).

Initial externalization from paid-angle-scoring.md prose. 5 lenses with weights (verbatim 35% + awareness 25% + emotional 20% + objection 20% + placement binary filter), cluster_dedupe_rule, anchor_priority, output_caps, transverse_invariants (voice consistency + emotional diversity), risk_bet_slot, anti_patterns, _change_log.

Centralized severity canon. BLOCKER/MAJOR/MINOR levels + sourcing_tags (observed/stated/structured/derived) + operator_facing_translation + canon_origin_tags (canon_ref vs derived). Consumed by analyze-copy, audit-meta-setup, validate-resources, compatibility-rules, paid-angle-scoring-weights.

Verbatim anchor obligatoire par cellule (voc_id brand-side OR derived skill-author OR breakthrough mode opt-in 1 slot max). Corrélations axes Status/Belonging/Insider documentées explicitement (non-MECE flagué) — variations Identity-as-distinction, pas angles distincts.
Regenerated post frontmatter triad batch. 38 skills total, machine-verifiable CMR-compliance via grep reasoning_pattern.

Batch archive of ~22 stale research/ docs (onboarding stress tests, offers v2.0 batch, profile v2.0 proposal, calibration cabaia, overnight reports, legacy specs). README explains context. Append-only — no permanent deletion.

consumer_re_test_list: skills consuming pattern-schema.json or compatibility-rules.json (analyze-copy, future audit skills)
skills consuming paid-angle-scoring.md (paid-angles weights moved to JSON — verify resolver)
next_release_candidates: Phase 2.5 mass tag reasoning_pattern: null on 49 non-CMR skills (cosmetic, scriptable)
PTD full doctrine when trigger conditions hit
Skill produce-script or analyze-copy --mode=rewrite to close audit→draft loop
